Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Phillip F. Shinn; LimNexus LLP; 213-955-9500; appearing as counsel for Defendant Sony Interactive Entertainment LLC.
Jessica M. Takano; Donahue Fitzgerald LLP; 510-451-3300; appearing as counsel for Plaintiff.

Defendant contests the court's tentative decision. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SONY INTERACTIVE ENTERTAINMENT LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION: Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist regarding waiver of timely billing provisions of the lease. See additional facts 34, 35 and 36. Defendants also dispute Plaintiff's additional fact 26 and present evidence in reply to support this disputed fact.

Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. CCP 437c(f)(1). None of the purported issues for summary adjudication "completely disposed of a cause of action, and affirmative defense, a claim for damages, or an issue of duty." Motion for Summary Adjudication is framed by the pleadings which assert that "Sony has failed to pay Additional Charges incurred for the years 2018 through 2021 the past due amount owed to Plaintiff is $575,355.15, plus accrued interest." (Complaint, paragraph 8).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
